name: Southland Pawn & Jewelry INC.
description_short: 30+ year-old pawn shop in Morrow, GA specializing in jewelry, electronics, and collectibles with in-house jewelry repair and master jeweler expertise.
description_long:
Southland Pawn & Jewelry Inc. has operated continuously for over 30 years in Morrow, Georgia under the ownership and operation of Mr. Steven Borders, a 2nd generation master jeweler with 40+ years of bench jeweler experience. The store is located at 6321 Jonesboro Road and serves the local community by providing traditional pawn services alongside specialized jewelry services. Borders purchased the business after losing a 25-year career, motivated to control his own destiny and continue his family's jewelry legacy—his father was the first Black jewelry store owner in Washington DC.

The store primarily buys and sells gold and silver jewelry, watches, game systems, tools, electronics, and audio equipment (subwoofers/speakers). A key differentiator is their in-house jewelry repair service, which they advertise as typically completed within 30 minutes or same-day, along with custom jewelry manufacturing at affordable prices. The business maintains reasonable operating hours (Mon-Fri 10am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm) and provides phone and email contact options. They currently have a 100% rating on the Buya marketplace with 3 items sold through that platform.

Southland Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through professional memberships and affiliations, including membership in both the Jewelers Board of Trade and the National Pawnbrokers Association—memberships they proudly advertise as indicators of legitimacy and standards compliance. Their merchandise is reviewed by the Morrow Police Department, suggesting compliance with local regulatory requirements. The owner's personal background as a master jeweler provides technical credibility for the jewelry-focused aspects of the business, setting them apart from typical generalist pawn operations.

As an established local pawn shop, Southland serves customers needing quick collateral-based loans, secondhand merchandise purchases, and specialty jewelry services. However, potential customers should note the business operates only during standard retail hours with limited online presence beyond the Buya marketplace listing, which may restrict accessibility for some consumers.
pros: 30+ years of continuous operation demonstrates longevity and community establishment
Owner is a certified 2nd generation master jeweler with 40+ years bench experience
In-house jewelry repair typically completed same-day or within 30 minutes
Member of both Jewelers Board of Trade and National Pawnbrokers Association
Custom jewelry manufacturing offered at advertised affordable prices
Merchandise reviewed and regulated by Morrow Police Department
100% customer rating on Buya marketplace platform
cons: Limited online presence—only listed on Buya marketplace with minimal web footprint
Standard pawn shop hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-5pm Saturdays) may not accommodate all customers
Only 3 items sold on Buya platform suggests limited online transaction volume or reach
No information provided about loan terms, interest rates, or collateral valuation processes
No mention of alternative languages, delivery services, or accessibility accommodations
best_for: Local Morrow, GA residents needing quick cash loans against jewelry, electronics, or collectibles
Customers seeking jewelry repair or custom manufacturing with certified master jeweler expertise
Buyers of secondhand luxury watches, gold/silver jewelry, and electronics in the Atlanta metro area
diagnosis: Southland Pawn & Jewelry is best for local Morrow/Atlanta-area customers needing quick collateral-based loans or seeking secondhand jewelry and electronics with the added benefit of certified jewelry repair expertise. The main caveat is limited online accessibility and lack of transparent information about loan terms, rates, and valuation—potential borrowers should contact them directly at (770) 961-7160 to discuss specific transaction terms before visiting.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry, electronics, watches, and collectibles
Purchase and sale of used jewelry and precious metals
In-house jewelry repair (same-day or 30-minute service advertised)
Purchase and sale of watches and timepieces
General collectibles and miscellaneous merchandise purchase
